exercises.code:
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile('w+', delete=False, encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write('ok')
    path=f.name
print(Path(path).read_text(encoding='utf-8').strip())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Exploro el fixture sintético de S27-T3-A-E3 y aplico solo el TODO/defecto del paquete. tempfile.
